title: Demorchis appendiculata
taxonomy: Demorchis appendiculata is classified as a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. More specifically, it belongs to the subfamily Orchidoideae, which is a large and diverse group of orchids. Further classification places Demorchis appendiculata in the tribe Cranichideae, known for its unique and often underground flowering habits. The exact classification of Demorchis appendiculata can vary depending on the source, but it is generally accepted as a member of the orchid family.
